description: Stable enrollment record identifier; replayed IDs are rejected.
Operator-approved deployment root that anchors collector, key, topology, and schema facts.
Root class such as KMS/HSM/hardware-attestation/fixture-hmac.
Root lifecycle state; active required.
UTC start of admissible root window.
UTC end of admissible root window.
Signing key bound to the deployment root.
Monotonic key rotation epoch with no uncovered collection interval.
Operator identity bound to policy, enrollment, and gatechain identity.
Collector identity; unique under one operator/root binding.
Firmware or measurement identity for the collector binary/device.
Time at which firmware identity was attested.
Topology identity used by downstream telemetry joins.
Version or digest of topology map accepted for the measurement window.
Production telemetry schema version expected by ingestion.
Measurement run provenance ID propagated into downstream gatechain identifiers.
Bundle identity propagated into attestation, intake, and gatechain stages.
Stable source for power, byte, latency, or security counters.
Counter binding covers collector, topology, tenant, security context, and measurement run.
Tenant identity required for isolation and claim-boundary checks.
Security context required for downstream security/provenance gates.
Evidence label; fixture labels cannot mimic production_target.
